max_resolution.external: Up to 1280x1024 with Virtual Screen mode

Display.multi_display: Simultaneous LCD and CRT, multiple-monitor support for Windows 98

memory.slots: One 144-pin SO-DIMM socket (64MB on planar, 1 socket available)
memory.features: 64MB std; socket accessed by removing screw on base

display_options: 13.3" TFT XGA 1024x768, 150 to 1 contrast ratio, 150 degree tilt, 125 nits (AC) / 70 nits (batt)
Ethernet: Not supported onboard (optional via PC Card or UltraBase)

Battery.capacity: Intelligent, supports second battery in UltraBase
Battery.form: Removable battery locked with a latch

ports: 2 x Type I/II/III PC Card slots (CardBus 32-bit, Zoomed Video)
keyboard: Full-size 85-key keyboard with 10 Fn functions, integrated palm rest, no lift-up keyboard
TrackPoint with Press-to-Select, Release-to-Select, center button for scrolling/magnifying glass

physical.dimensions: 11.8 x 9.4 x 1.0 inches (12.1" models) / 11.8 x 9.4 x 1.1 inches (13.3" models); 122 cubic inches
physical.weight: 3.9 lbs (1.78 kg) for 12.1" model; 4.0 lbs (1.83 kg) for 13.3" models (with battery)
physical.case_material: Top: carbon-fiber reinforced plastic; Bottom: glass-fiber reinforced plastic

security: Phillips-head screw on base for memory, optional Allen screw for disk
